style_name: Surreal Fish Doodle Landmark Photo Collage Style
style_summary: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: oversized illustrated traveler, guide, fisherman, skateboarder, courier, musician, or explorer
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning over a landmark, floating through the scene, pulling a stripe pole, balancing on a fish, chasing a creature, or bending around architecture
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: painted hiking staff, fishing line, travel bag, map, snack, camera, kite string, ferry ticket, umbrella, or oversized pencil
environment_variables.LOCATION: recognizable travel landmark, bridge, bay, harbor, canal, cliff road, mountain pass, plaza, or observation deck
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: blue sky, water, landmark structure, distant city, boats, coastline, clouds, bridge cables, buildings, or tourist-view scenery
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: optional tiny hand-lettered travel caption or none
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: optional small doodle label or none
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black marker loop, ink starburst, blue water drop, splash dash, curved string, motion tick, or tiny fish trail
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: bold flat-color outfit, patterned grid shirt, oversized cap, sunglasses, striped socks, graphic shoes, raincoat, vest, or travel uniform
environment_variables.ASPECT_RATIO: 9:16 vertical travel poster or 16:9 horizontal scenic banner

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.
Photo base: use a realistic bright travel photograph with clear natural daylight, postcard-like scenic depth, readable sky and water or architecture, and a believable tourist-view perspective.
Illustration layer: overlay one oversized flat 2D illustrated subject across the foreground and middle ground.

The subject should look pasted or screen-printed on top of the photo, with opaque flat color fills, thick black hand-drawn outlines, simplified hands or face, exaggerated scale, playful anatomy, and bold graphic wardrobe colors.
Doodle layer: add ACCENT_SYMBOL plus loose black marker loops, ink starbursts, blue water drops, curved strings, short splash dashes, and motion ticks as an independent graphic layer.
Use these marks to create playful movement and connect the illustrated characters to the travel photo.
If text is requested, use MAIN_TEXT only as a tiny hand-lettered travel note and SECONDARY_TEXT only as a sparse doodle label.

Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, signatures, QR codes, platform marks, app UI, copied reference characters, exact reference poses, brand logos, readable brand marks, full vector-only backgrounds, glossy 3D cartoon rendering, photorealistic animals, dense text, or dark cyberpunk mood.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.rendering_mode: bright landmark travel-photo collage with flat 2D illustrated overlays
image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.vertical_9x16: Use a vertical travel-poster composition. Let the landmark rise through the lower and middle frame, with sky or open scenery in the upper half. Place the oversized illustrated subject diagonally across the center, overlapping the landmark and reaching toward the lower third. Put smaller fish creatures in the upper corners and near the bottom edge.
composition.horizontal_16x9: Use a horizontal scenic banner composition. Stretch the landmark photo wide across the frame, with the main illustrated subject entering from one side and crossing the middle. Arrange fish creatures along the sky and waterline for lateral motion. Keep black marker loops, strings, and starbursts near the outer thirds so the landmark remains visible in the center.
layout_principles: Use a real-looking travel landmark photograph as the base layer.
Keep the landmark recognizable and uncluttered enough to read instantly.
Overlay one oversized flat illustrated subject that crosses the photo dramatically.
Add two to five smaller fantastical fish or flying fish creatures.
Use high-saturation flat color blocks: red, cobalt blue, yellow, green, cream, and black.
Place black marker loops, starbursts, and motion marks as independent graphic accents.
Make the illustration feel pasted onto the photo, not physically rendered inside it.
Exclude watermarks, usernames, platform marks, QR codes, and signatures.

typography: Use black marker loops and scribbles as non-readable graphic marks.
If MAIN_TEXT is used, keep it tiny and hand-lettered like a travel note.
Keep SECONDARY_TEXT optional, sparse, and free of platform or creator identifiers.
Never reproduce a reference signature, handle, watermark, or creator mark.
design_rules: Use realistic landmark, bay, bridge, harbor, canal, or coastline photography.
Make the cartoon overlays large, flat, colorful, and visibly pasted onto the photo.
Use bold black outlines and simple expressive creature faces.
Use one main human or creature action that interacts with the landmark.
Add smaller fish creatures to create a floating ecosystem around the subject.
Use black scribble loops and starbursts for graphic rhythm.
Use blue drops, thin lines, strings, or splash marks to connect creatures to the scene.
Keep the image clean of watermarks, handles, platform marks, and signatures.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template:
Create an image in the "Surreal Fish Doodle Landmark Photo Collage" style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, using {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, at {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Photo base: use a realistic bright travel photograph with clear natural daylight, postcard-like scenic depth, readable sky and water or architecture, and a believable tourist-view perspective. Keep the landmark recognizable.

Illustration layer: overlay one oversized flat 2D illustrated subject across the foreground and middle ground. The subject should look pasted or screen-printed on top of the photo, with opaque flat color fills, thick black hand-drawn outlines, simplified hands or face, exaggerated scale, playful anatomy, and bold graphic wardrobe colors.

Creature layer: add two to five fantastical folk-art fish or flying fish around the main subject. Give them mismatched fins, wing-like shapes, round eyes, black tiger-like body stripes, red coral fins, cobalt-blue sections, yellow bodies, and simple black outlines. Let some creatures float in the sky, skim the waterline, or pass behind the main subject.

Doodle layer: add {ACCENT_SYMBOL} plus loose black marker loops, ink starbursts, blue water drops, curved strings, short splash dashes, and motion ticks as an independent graphic layer. Use these marks to create playful movement and connect the illustrated characters to the travel photo.

Text: keep typography minimal. If text is requested, use "{MAIN_TEXT}" only as a tiny hand-lettered travel note and "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as a sparse doodle label. Do not make large poster headlines.

Derive only the visual language from the style. Change the landmark, subject pose, outfit, props, and creature arrangement for every new image. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, signatures, QR codes, platform marks, app UI, copied reference characters, exact reference poses, brand logos, readable brand marks, full vector-only backgrounds, glossy 3D cartoon rendering, photorealistic animals, dense text, or dark cyberpunk mood.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, signature, platform logo, QR code, app UI, copied reference artwork, exact reference character, exact reference pose, original reference landmark copy, original reference outfit copy, original reference prop, logo, readable brand mark, full vector scene, blurred landmark, dark cyberpunk city, horror mood, dystopian scene, glossy 3D cartoon, plush mascot, photorealistic fish, realistic CG animal, heavy typography, dense text, corporate travel ad, sterile stock photo, messy unreadable collage

values.SUBJECT: a giant flat illustrated courier with a cobalt raincoat and lemon-yellow scarf
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: balancing on a long folk-art fish above a canal bridge
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: rolled map, waterproof satchel, and dangling delivery ticket
values.LOCATION: old canal city at golden-hour daylight
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: stone bridge, canal water, old buildings, small boats, warm sky, windows, and rippled reflections
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black ink loop, blue droplets, tiny splash dashes, and crescent-shaped fish trail
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: cobalt raincoat, lemon-yellow scarf, coral socks, flat black shoes, and burnt-orange hood

values.LOCATION: bright harbor promenade with a skyline and ferry boats
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: blue harbor water, ferry wake, skyline towers, railing, promenade path, white clouds, and distant hills
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black comic starburst, fish trail, water drops, and short marker ticks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: cream vest, green flowing pants, yellow checked sleeves, coral shoes, and round sunglasses

values.SUBJECT: a giant flat illustrated road-trip musician with a yellow coat and blue hat
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: marching along a coastal cliff road while leading a parade of flying fish
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: striped walking stick, tiny horn, and map pouch
values.LOCATION: sunny coastal cliff road above turquoise water
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: curving road, ocean cliffs, turquoise water, roadside grass, distant headland, blue sky, and small parked cars
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black spiral loop, ink starburst, blue wind drops, and thin marching strings
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: yellow coat, blue hat, green scarf, striped socks, red shoes, and loose travel layers
